news.t: Solar ETF soars as Biden leads in polls. Other groups that could benefit from a Democratic win
Best Performing Infrastructure ETFs for Q3 2020

holdings.infoBox: TOLZ is an equity ETF with a total of 113 individual holdings. The top holdings are Enbridge stock at 7.51%, National Grid at 4.95%, Vinci at 4.56%, TC Energy at 4.43%, and The Williams Companies at 3.95%.

overview.description: The ProShares DJ Brookfield Global Infrastructure ETF (TOLZ) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in stocks based on a particular theme. The fund tracks an index of companies that derive more than 70% of cash flows from infrastructure-related businesses. TOLZ was launched on Mar 25, 2014 and is issued by ProShares.

data.title: Solar ETF soars as Biden leads in polls. Other groups that could benefit from a Democratic win
data.text: The Invesco Solar ETF (TAN) is one of the market's hottest trades, and there could be more upside in the cards for it and other groups, market analysts say.

data.title: Best Performing Infrastructure ETFs for Q3 2020
data.text: The best infrastructure ETFs for Q3 2020 are NFRA, TOLZ, and EMLP.
